svg.title: Arquitectura Dijon Événements
svg.desc: Diagrama de la arquitectura completa: app Android, backend Spring Boot, OpenAgenda, Firebase y PostgreSQL

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Android app tech stack')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Spring Boot backend')
sendPrompt('How does the OpenAgenda API integration work?')
sendPrompt('What data is stored in PostgreSQL?')
sendPrompt('How do push notifications work with Firebase FCM?')
sendPrompt('How is CI/CD configured with GitHub Actions?')
sendPrompt('How is the backend deployed on Render?')
